headline: Jim Cramer Expects Clarity on United Airlines Expansion Plans After Earnings
summary: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:UAL) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s recent Mad Money game plan. headline: Wall Street Brunch: Tesla Reports As Earnings Season Picks Up
summary: Tesla leads a busy week as 93 S&P 500 companies report. American rejects merger talks with United after Bloomberg reports Kirby outreach. March retail sales are expected higher.
